subject: data(experience): reframe audio analytics highlight to scoped, sold, co-built
body:
Clarifies the user's actual role on the audio analytics engagement: they
led the consulting, scoping, and sales side and contributed as part of the
delivery team rather than being sole builder.

Tags: data, experience, cv
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: cv-content
Semver: patch
